findings.message: cryptography 43.0.3 has active CVEs (CVE-2026-34073, CVE-2026-26007). Fix available at 46.0.6.
findings.fix: Upgrade to cryptography>=46.0.6

findings.message: starlette==0.46.0 (fastapi transitive dep) has PYSEC-2026-161 Host header injection enabling auth bypass via reconstructed URL path.
findings.fix: Upgrade FastAPI to a version bundling starlette>=1.0.1

findings.message: httpx AsyncClient.delete() does not accept json= kwarg. TypeError at runtime. Cloudflare cache purge never fires. Disabled links remain live at edge.
findings.fix: Change client.delete(..., json=payload) to client.post(..., json=payload). Cloudflare purge uses POST.

findings.message: boto3 SES/SQS clients called synchronously inside async handlers. Blocks the event loop for full network round-trip on every email or SQS send.
findings.fix: Wrap boto3 calls in run_in_executor or switch to aioboto3.

findings.snippet: async def verify_email(token: str, db: DBDep) -> None:
findings.message: verify-email token accepted as query parameter. Token appears in server logs, proxy logs, browser history, and Referer headers.
findings.fix: Accept token in request body via Pydantic model.

findings.message: Click idempotency uses full-precision timestamp. Simultaneous clicks on same link cause IntegrityError; replayed events with clock skew double-count.
findings.fix: Add stable event_id UUID from redirect service as the idempotency key.

findings.message: Synchronous boto3 SQS poll with 20s wait inside async def run(). Blocks event loop. No concurrency within worker.
findings.fix: Use run_in_executor for the receive_message call, or switch to aioboto3.

findings.snippet: router GET /v1/ops/abuse-reviews protected by AdminDep only
findings.message: Any workspace admin can view, disable, and hard-delete links across all workspaces. Cross-tenant privilege escalation.
findings.fix: Add workspace scoping or introduce is_ops_staff role.

findings.message: disabled_at not filtered in workspace-member link queries. Disabled links visible and editable by workspace members contrary to ERD spec.
findings.fix: Add Link.disabled_at.is_(None) to member-facing queries.

findings.message: python-jose has CVEs and is unused in the codebase. Dead dependency with known vulnerabilities.
findings.fix: Remove python-jose from pyproject.toml.

findings.message: CORS allows all headers with credentials=True. Weakens header-based security controls.
findings.fix: Use explicit allowlist: ["Content-Type", "X-CSRF-Token", "X-Request-Id"].

findings.message: X-Request-Id trusted from all callers. Enables log injection.
findings.fix: Validate as UUID before trusting, or always generate fresh.

findings.snippet: user.id (User | None accessed without explicit null guard)
findings.message: mypy: user attribute access on possibly-None after scalar_one_or_none. Relies on exception propagation for null safety.
findings.fix: Add explicit if user is None: raise UnauthorizedError() after the verify block.

findings.snippet: responses = [await _link_to_response(link, db) for link in items]
findings.message: N+1 click-count queries per list_links response. Default page_size=50 fires 51 queries.
findings.fix: Single aggregation query for click counts across all link_ids in page.

findings.message: date_from/date_to accept timezone-naive datetimes. Comparison against timezone-aware column produces wrong results.
findings.fix: Validate tzinfo != None or default to UTC.

findings.message: httpx.TransientError does not exist; correct name is httpx.TransportError. Transient network errors propagate as unhandled exceptions.
findings.fix: Change to except httpx.TransportError:

findings.message: uq_workspace_member_active_user partial unique index exists in migration but not in ORM. autogenerate will silently drop it.
findings.fix: Add partial Index to WorkspaceMember.__table_args__.

findings.message: No server_default or trigger on updated_at. Direct DB writes produce stale timestamps.
findings.fix: Add server_default=func.now() and onupdate=func.now() in migration.

findings.message: AbuseReview.workspace_id has no FK to workspace. ERD specifies FK. Orphaned records accumulate silently.
findings.fix: Add ForeignKey("workspace.id", ondelete="RESTRICT") to workspace_id.

findings.message: Click.workspace_id has no FK to workspace. Same issue as ERD-01.
findings.fix: Add ForeignKey("workspace.id", ondelete="RESTRICT") to workspace_id.

findings.snippet: async def delete_all_for_user(self, user_id: uuid.UUID) -> None: pass
findings.message: delete_all_for_user is a no-op. Redis keys accumulate for 30 days after account compromise. Force-logout silently fails.
findings.fix: Implement active Redis key revocation via per-user session ID set.

findings.message: CSRF middleware only covers /v1/ prefix. Future endpoints outside /v1/ bypass CSRF silently.
findings.fix: Apply CSRF to all mutating requests; use explicit exempt set.

findings.snippet: async def resend_verification(ctx: AuthDep, db: DBDep) -> None:
findings.message: No rate limit on resend-verification. Unlimited SES sends possible from authenticated session.
findings.fix: Add RateLimiter.check_resend_verification(user_id) enforcing e.g. 3/hour.

findings.message: 22 F821 undefined-name violations in ORM models for SQLAlchemy forward references. CI-breaking with current ruff config.
findings.fix: Add # noqa: F821 or configure per-file ignores in pyproject.toml.

findings.snippet: from fastapi import APIRouter, Query (Query unused)
findings.message: 40 unused imports across production code. Inflate import time and obscure actual dependencies.
findings.fix: Run ruff check --fix app/ to auto-remove safe unused imports.

findings.message: Email URLs hardcode production domain. Staging/dev testing always points to production. Config-code discrepancy.
findings.fix: Add settings.app_base_url and use it in all email URL templates.

findings.message: Token as query param also appears in Referer headers on client-side redirect. Covered by API-01 but spec angle: PRD §tokens specifies single-use secrets must not leak.
findings.fix: See API-01 fix.

findings.message: Hardcoded dummy hash parameters may diverge from live PasswordHasher defaults, enabling timing-based email enumeration. PRD §Account requires enumeration prevention.
findings.fix: Generate dummy hash at startup using ph.hash() to match live parameters.
